suite.name: Klar Demo

kw.name: Open Klar App
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/gerhardgustav/Desktop/openclaw-hack/property-intel/tests/results/browser/traces/temp/b03152c0-7a48-4a24-b50b-2d0fb698d946"}

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page

test.name: Dashboard Shows Klar Navigation
test.doc: The nav bar shows "Klar" logo and 4 tabs

test.name: Dashboard Shows Three Clients
